title: Uruguayan Cheese Pull
description: A keto-friendly dish inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, made with seared cheese.
instructions: 1. Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add butter to the pan and let it melt.
3. Place the cheddar cheese in the wok and sear until it starts to melt.
4. Use a spatula to gently pull the cheese apart into strings.
5. Continue to cook until the cheese is golden brown and slightly crispy.
6. Season with black pepper and serve immediately.
